headline: Extra Space Storage Inc (NYSE:EXR) Delivers Stunning Earnings Beat in Q1 2026
summary: Extra Space Storage (EXR) smashed Q1 2026 estimates with $2.04 EPS vs. $1.13 expected, beating revenue by 6.3% and signaling strong operational momentum.

raw.headline: Extra Space Storage Inc (NYSE:EXR) Delivers Stunning Earnings Beat in Q1 2026

headline: Extra Space (EXR) Q3 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: Joseph Margolis: Thank you, Jared.  Last quarter, we reported that our high occupancy allowed us to begin pushing new customer rates, which inflected positive for the first time in 3 years.  This trend continued and accelerated in the third quarter as we achieved new customer rate growth of over 3% year-over-year net of discounts.

headline: Extra Space (EXR) Q2 2025 Earnings Transcript
summary: Joseph Daniel Margolis: Thank you for joining us today.  For the last 34 earnings calls, I've turned this over to Scott Stupp, who has always provide balanced, accurate, transparent and helpful commentary.

headline: Public Storage's Q1 FFO Beats Estimates on Non-Same-Store Growth
